# Sync

Sync data between multiple peers and persist in a local database.

## Installation

Install the module

```bash
npm install @wordpress/sync --save
```

## API

<!-- START TOKEN(Autogenerated API docs) -->

### createIndexedDBConnection

Function that creates a connection to the IndexedDB persistence provider.

### createSyncProvider

Create a sync provider.

_Parameters_

-   _connectLocal_ `ConnectDoc | null`: Connect the document to a local database.
-   _connectRemote_ `ConnectDoc | null`: Connect the document to a remote sync connection.

_Returns_

-   `SyncProvider`: Sync provider.

### createWebRTCConnection

Function that creates a new WebRTC connection.

_Parameters_

-   _config_ `WebrtcConnectionConfig`: The configuration for the WebSocket connection.

_Returns_

-   `ConnectDoc`: A function that connects a Y.Doc to a WebRTC endpoint.

### createWebSocketConnection

Function that creates a new WebSocket Connection.

_Parameters_

-   _config_ `WebsocketConnectionConfig`: The configuration for the WebSocket connection.

_Returns_

-   `ConnectDoc`: A function that connects a Y.Doc to a WebSocket server.

### currentEncodingVersion

Undocumented declaration.

### extractFromYGutenbergComment

Undocumented declaration.

### getSyncProvider

Undocumented declaration.

### Y

Export dependencies

<!-- END TOKEN(Autogenerated API docs) -->

## Contributing to this package

This is an individual package that's part of the Gutenberg project. The project is organized as a monorepo. It's made up of multiple self-contained software packages, each with a specific purpose. The packages in this monorepo are published to [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/) and used by [WordPress](https://make.wordpress.org/core/) as well as other software projects.

To find out more about contributing to this package or Gutenberg as a whole, please read the project's main [contributor guide](https://github.com/WordPress/gutenberg/tree/HEAD/CONTRIBUTING.md).
